'''lowavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:phaeochrous|phaeochrous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-w-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:phaeochrous|phaeochrous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lowavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lowavithi|lowavithi]] || [[word:lowaviji|lowaviji]] || [[word:lowavishi|lowavishi]] || [[word:lowaviki|lowaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lowavuthuthu|lowavuthuthu]] || [[word:lowavujuju|lowavujuju]] || [[word:lowavushushu|lowavushushu]] || [[word:lowavukuku|lowavukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lowavuthu|lowavuthu]] || [[word:lowavuju|lowavuju]] || [[word:lowavushu|lowavushu]] || [[word:lowavuku|lowavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lowavufthuf|lowavufthuf]] || [[word:lowavufjuf|lowavufjuf]] || [[word:lowavufshuf|lowavufshuf]] || [[word:lowavufkuf|lowavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lowavethe|lowavethe]] || [[word:lowaveje|lowaveje]] || [[word:lowaveshe|lowaveshe]] || [[word:lowaveke|lowaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lowavothotho|lowavothotho]] || [[word:lowavojojo|lowavojojo]] || [[word:lowavoshosho|lowavoshosho]] || [[word:lowavokoko|lowavokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lowavotho|lowavotho]] || [[word:lowavojo|lowavojo]] || [[word:lowavosho|lowavosho]] || [[word:lowavoko|lowavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lowavofthof|lowavofthof]] || [[word:lowavofjof|lowavofjof]] || [[word:lowavofshof|lowavofshof]] || [[word:lowavofkof|lowavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lowavĂŻfthĂŻf|lowavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lowavĂŻfjĂŻf|lowavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lowavĂŻfshĂŻf|lowavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lowavĂŻfkĂŻf|lowavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lowavĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|lowavĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lowavĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|lowavĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lowavĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|lowavĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lowavĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|lowavĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lowavĂŻfthĂŻf|lowavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lowavĂŻfjĂŻf|lowavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lowavĂŻfshĂŻf|lowavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lowavĂŻfkĂŻf|lowavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lowavĂŻfthĂŻf|lowavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lowavĂŻfjĂŻf|lowavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lowavĂŻfshĂŻf|lowavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lowavĂŻfkĂŻf|lowavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lowavĂŠthĂŠ|lowavĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:lowavĂŠjĂŠ|lowavĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:lowavĂŠshĂŠ|lowavĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:lowavĂŠkĂŠ|lowavĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lowavathatha|lowavathatha]] || [[word:lowavajaja|lowavajaja]] || [[word:lowavashasha|lowavashasha]] || [[word:lowavakaka|lowavakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lowavatha|lowavatha]] || [[word:lowavaja|lowavaja]] || [[word:lowavasha|lowavasha]] || [[word:lowavaka|lowavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lowavafthaf|lowavafthaf]] || [[word:lowavafjaf|lowavafjaf]] || [[word:lowavafshaf|lowavafshaf]] || [[word:lowavafkaf|lowavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:lowavasha|lowavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:lowavshĂ«sha|lowavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lowavrosha|lowavrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lowavmusha|lowavmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:lowavyasha|lowavyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golowavnkshĂ«sha|golowavnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golowavnkrosha|golowavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golowavnkmusha|golowavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golowavnkyasha|golowavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:lowawavasha|lowawavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lowawavshĂ«sha|lowawavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lowawavrosha|lowawavrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lowawavmusha|lowawavmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lowawavyasha|lowawavyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golowawavnkshĂ«sha|golowawavnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golowawavnkrosha|golowawavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golowawavnkmusha|golowawavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golowawavnkyasha|golowawavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:lewĂŠvasha|lewĂŠvasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lewĂŠvshĂ«sha|lewĂŠvshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lewĂŠvrosha|lewĂŠvrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lewĂŠvmusha|lewĂŠvmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lewĂŠvyasha|lewĂŠvyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golewĂŠvnkshĂ«sha|golewĂŠvnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golewĂŠvnkrosha|golewĂŠvnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golewĂŠvnkmusha|golewĂŠvnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golewĂŠvnkyasha|golewĂŠvnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:lowfavasha|lowfavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lowfavshĂ«sha|lowfavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lowfavrosha|lowfavrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lowfavmusha|lowfavmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lowfavyasha|lowfavyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golowfavnkshĂ«sha|golowfavnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golowfavnkrosha|golowfavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golowfavnkmusha|golowfavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golowfavnkyasha|golowfavnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
